scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.server: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stop-dev.ps1 -Ports 5000 && npm --prefix server run dev
scripts.client: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/stop-dev.ps1 -Ports 5173 && npm --prefix client run dev
